scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --workspace apps/api install && npm --workspace apps/web install
scripts.start: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoProfile','-Command','npm run start:api' ; npm run start:web"
scripts.dev: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoProfile','-Command','npm run dev:api' ; npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm --workspace apps/api run build && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace apps/api run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/web run typecheck
